title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Titan Company

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Titan Company
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Titan Company in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Titan Company:
Titan Company is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company!
